title: I wrote that, right? People forget using AI for help, research shows
description: People cannot reliably recall whether or not they used artificial intelligence to create a text after as little as one week, according to a new study.
content:
BAYREUTH: People cannot reliably recall whether or not they used artificial intelligence to create a text after as little as one week, according to a new study.

title: Scientists map more than 200 years of nature's progress

title: Companies push employees to use AI - just not too much

title: AI could double electricity use by 2030
